_schema: The Old School ripple chain's spine (CHARACTERS_SPEC ripple 2). Fires the evening before a storm. Helping costs real time blocks and sets storm_helped_hollis - the flag the legacy contract requires. Text is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6). Blanks S1-S3.

intro.speaker: hollis
intro.text: [BLANK S1 — Hollis at your door, storm coming tonight, his low field will flood without sandbags and he can't do it alone. He asks plain — no drama, no begging. Grammar note: he's asking a FAVOR, which costs him something to ask. Awaiting Director.]

options.text: [BLANK S2a — the player drops their plans and goes. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK S2b — the player says no; their own place needs them tonight. Honest, not cruel. Awaiting Director.]

helped.speaker: hollis
helped.text: [BLANK S3a — after the sandbagging, soaked and tired. He won't make a speech about it. One line that makes the lost day feel worth it. Awaiting Director.]

declined.speaker: hollis
declined.text: [BLANK S3b — he takes the no like a county man: no argument, no guilt trip. But it's noted. Short. Awaiting Director.]
